beIN SPORTS MAX 3.original_title: Czech Republic vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 3.title: Czech Republic vs Mexico - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
beIN SPORTS MAX 3.desc: Mexico faced Czechoslovakia at the 1962 World Cup, winning 3-1 in their final group game. This will be their first FIFA World Cup meeting since the split of Czechoslovakia in the early 1990s. Czechia and Mexico’s last meeting came in a February 2000 friendly, in Hong Kong, with Czechia winning 2-1.
